description_long: This is a wristwatch featuring a round, metallic case with a blue dial and a matching blue textured strap. The dial displays silver hour markers and hands, with a date window positioned at the 3 o'clock mark. The strap has a crocodile-embossed pattern and is secured with a metallic buckle clasp. The watch case is slim and the crown is located on the right side for time adjustment. The overall design is modern and stylish, suitable for both casual and formal urban settings.
description: A modern wristwatch with a blue dial, silver markers, and a blue crocodile-patterned strap with a metallic buckle.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue crocodile-patterned strap and the round blue dial with silver markers.
description_view_1: Side profile revealing the slim metallic case, crown, and the full length of the blue strap with the metallic buckle.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the blue strap and the edge of the watch case.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the strap's inner lining and the metallic buckle clasp.
attribute_dial_design: The dial is blue with silver rectangular hour markers and silver hands, featuring a date window at the 3 o'clock position. The design is minimalist and modern, with no subdials or decorative patterns.
attribute_strap_type: Textured leather strap with a crocodile-embossed pattern, colored blue.
attribute_watch_face_display: Analog display with three hands (hour, minute, second) and a date window at 3 o'clock.
